questions.question: Fill in the missing line to remove duplicate rows:
questions.codeSnippet:
df = pd.read_csv('data.csv')
# Your code here:
_______________
print(df.shape)
questions.explanation: drop_duplicates() removes all duplicate rows based on all columns by default.
questions.hint: There is a built-in pandas method for de-duping rows.

questions.question: Which method converts a pandas Series to datetime?
questions.explanation: pd.to_datetime() or Series.astype('datetime64[ns]') are the standard ways.

questions.question: What does `df['col'].isnull().sum()` return?
correctAnswer: count of nulls in the column
questions.explanation: isnull() marks missing values, and sum() counts them.
